title: CompanyOS schema audit

findings.subject: Schema files
findings.recommended_action: Create missing schemas and validate them in CI.

findings.subject: Runtime schema enforcement
findings.finding: Schemas are reference/partial unless enforcement refs prove runtime/CI gates; no API-level authority gateway verified.
findings.recommended_action: Add CI validators and runtime policy gateway before granting agent powers.

findings.subject: Architecture gap yes/no
findings.finding: No verified yes for authority gateway, tenant isolation, per-tenant Odoo DB, GitHub App auth, event triggers, Neo4j brain, or sub-1s task query.
findings.recommended_action: Build these as explicit CompanyOS readiness gates.

recommended_action: Move schemas from docs to CI/runtime enforcement gates.
